issues.title: Ollama: upgrade to batch embedding endpoint  API
issues.body:
Ollama is superseding the legacy [/api/embeddings](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#generate-embedding) embedding endpoint by a new batch embedding [/api/embed](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#generate-embeddings) one. 

The new endpoint supports batch embedding and introduces `keep-alive` and `truncates` request parameters are introduced.

Update the SpringAI `OllamaApi` and `OllamaEmbeddingModel` to leverage the new `/api/embed` and deprecate the legacy `/api/embeddings`.
